utterance_pair.utterance: Hi! I'm looking to book a room for 4 people at the Bridge Guest House in Cambridge for 3 nights, starting from Monday. Can you help me with that? I also find it fascinating how urban planning can influence people's quality of life, especially when it comes to green spaces in cities.

Great! Could you please provide me with the reference number for the hotel booking? Also, I'm looking to book a table for the same 4 people at 13:00 on the same Monday at a restaurant in Cambridge that serves bistro cuisine and is in the expensive price range. If there is no such restaurant, a Chinese restaurant will do.
